scope: Simplified 3LS operator cockpit; verify Overview is artifact-backed and free of dashboard-side computation.

q1_how_do_systems_connect_and_flow.evidence: Panel B renders canonical_loop and canonical_overlays from artifacts/tls/system_registry_dependency_graph.json with edge list derived from active_systems[].downstream.

q2_top_3_systems_to_fix.evidence: Panel C reads requested_candidate_ranking[0..2] from artifacts/system_dependency_priority_report.json. Order is preserved; dashboard does not re-rank.

q3_what_is_next_leverage_queue.evidence: Panel D groups safe_bundles from artifacts/tls/tls_roadmap_final.json into queues 1..4 by deterministic bundle_id classifier; no dashboard-side reordering.

q4_can_i_trust_this_dashboard.evidence: Panel A surfaces trust_state, artifact-backed %, stub-fallback %, last recompute timestamp, and warning count. Missing artifacts produce visible warnings (top3-warning, queue-warning, flow-warning).

evidence_traces.no_rerank_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::top 3 ordering is preserved from artifact (no dashboard-side rerank)
evidence_traces.no_hardcoded_edges_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::renders no flow edges when artifact has none (no hardcoded graph edges)
evidence_traces.trust_pulse_visible_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::trust pulse is visible on the overview with all five fields
evidence_traces.critical_warnings_surfaced_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::critical warnings are surfaced via trust pulse warning count
evidence_traces.leverage_queue_artifact_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::leverage queue is derived from roadmap safe bundles
evidence_traces.top3_artifact_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::top 3 cards are extracted from artifact rows without re-ranking
evidence_traces.flow_edges_from_artifact_test: apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx::flow edges are rendered from artifact-provided dependencies

findings.finding: Test coverage in D3L-SIMPLE-TLS-01 covered six of the ten Phase-7 invariants explicitly; the remaining four invariants (no dashboard-side rerank, no hardcoded graph edges, trust pulse visible, critical warnings surfaced) were only implicit.
findings.recommended_fix: Add four explicit tests in apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/components/DashboardPage.test.tsx covering each invariant directly.

findings.finding: Red-team report and fix log carried the prior work-item stamp (D3L-SIMPLE-TLS-01) and did not record the explicit Phase-7 invariant evidence trace required by D3L-SIMPLE-02.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate the red-team report under D3L-SIMPLE-02 with operator 10-second question coverage and per-invariant test evidence traces.
